summary: Seoul markets braced for volatility amid Middle East tensions. KOSPI closed at 5,553.92. Domestic energy-saving measures implemented. Shin Hyun-song nominated as Bank of Korea governor.
market_drivers: Geopolitical Risks: Middle East crisis impacting oil and FX
Energy Measures: Public vehicle rationing and 20% cut in LNG power
BoK Leadership: Shin Hyun-song seen as pragmatic hawk
